query: Fetch publishers with declining quarterly trends in 2024, then for each generate a renewal recommendation (hold, expand, reduce).

step_1_sql.query: WITH q AS (SELECT publisher, fiscal_quarter, SUM(amount_usd) AS qs FROM consumption_facts WHERE fiscal_year = 2024 GROUP BY publisher, fiscal_quarter) SELECT publisher, MAX(qs) FILTER (WHERE fiscal_quarter = 1) AS q1, MAX(qs) FILTER (WHERE fiscal_quarter = 4) AS q4 FROM q GROUP BY publisher HAVING MAX(qs) FILTER (WHERE fiscal_quarter = 4) < MAX(qs) FILTER (WHERE fiscal_quarter = 1)

step_2_consumer.task: Recommend renewal posture per publisher with decline pattern
